name: Plum Acquisition Corp, IV
business: We are a blank check company, incorporated as a Cayman Islands exempted company for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses.

catalysts.event: Deadline to complete initial business combination
catalysts.sentence: We will have only until July 16, 2026 or until such earlier liquidation date as our board of directors may approve to complete our initial business combination, or during any Extension Period.
